recommendations.title: Badland Hunters
recommendations.overview: After a deadly earthquake turns Seoul into a lawless badland, a fearless huntsman springs into action to rescue a teenager abducted by a mad doctor.

recommendations.title: The Human Race
recommendations.overview: A cancer survivor, an amputee, several immigrants, and many others are snatched from a Los Angeles street and forced to take part in a deadly race.

recommendations.title: Dead Rising: Endgame
recommendations.overview: Investigative reporter Chase Carter must stop a secret government conspiracy in the zombie infested quarantine zone of East Mission City.

recommendations.title: The Killer
recommendations.overview: In lawless badlands, reclusive Cabeleira sets out to discover the fate of his gunman father and grows to be a feared assassin himself.

recommendations.title: Superstition
recommendations.overview: A witch put to death in 1692 swears vengeance on her persecutors and returns to the present day to punish their descendants.

recommendations.title: The Prophecy
recommendations.overview: The angel Gabriel comes to Earth to collect a soul which will end the stalemated war in Heaven. However, it is hidden inside of a Native American girl and only a former priest and a schoolteacher can stop him.

recommendations.title: Interview with a Hitman
recommendations.overview: An elite hitman returns to erase his past only to find that somebody has messed with his future.

recommendations.title: Logorama
recommendations.overview: Two cops portrayed by Michelin Men chase an armed Ronald McDonald through the streets of a fictionalized, stylized city.
recommendations.director: Ludovic Houplain, François Alaux, Hervé de Crécy

recommendations.title: Clock
recommendations.overview: On the eve of her 38th birthday, a woman desperately attempts to fix her broken biological clock.

recommendations.title: WWE WrestleMania 36: Part 1
recommendations.overview: The first night of the 36th annual WrestleMania event being held at the WWE Performance Center in Orlando, Florida, hosted by former New England Patriots Tight End Rob Gronkowski.
